description_long: This is a round, white plastic lotion bottle with a short cylindrical neck and a wide, squat body. The front label features Japanese text, a green and blue logo, and a small illustration of a person, indicating it is a personal care product. The bottle has a smooth, glossy surface with a screw-on cap that appears slightly translucent and is also white. The back of the bottle displays dense blue Japanese text, likely containing product information and instructions. There is a visible seam running vertically along the side, and a large white label with additional text wraps around the lower portion. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, suitable for easy handling and dispensing in urban environments.
description: A compact, round white plastic lotion bottle with Japanese branding, a screw-on cap, and colorful front graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with Japanese text, a green and blue logo, and a small illustration.
description_view_1: Angled front-left view highlighting the bottle's round shape and the continuation of the front label.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying dense blue Japanese text and a barcode on the back label.
description_view_3: Angled rear-left view showing the seam along the side and the back label wrapping around.
